3282100.name: Ruins of Araethia
3282100.description:
Explore a medieval fantasy world that is slowly being taken over by a terrible curse.  The land is full of savages, bandits, outlaws, and those desperate enough to resort to robbery to survive. You begin with no power or money, but through your actions, you might just manage to become someone important.

[FEATURES]

-Explore an open world full of dangers and mysteries, and take big risks in return for big rewards

-Train your characters with 12 different useful skills to level, each affecting how you can interact with the world in a different way

-Become a performer, merchant, bounty hunter, treasure hunter, or a beggar simply scraping by

-Start off as a weakling and slowly work your way towards becoming powerful
3282100.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
